gauge.name: Tulpehocken Creek at Blue Marsh Dam

impacts.statement: Rebers Bridge Road is subject to closures.

The level at which the reservoir begins to spill. The emergency spillway is an ungated, excavated channel located along the reservoir rim. Discharge through the emergency spillway is uncontrolled and intended to prevent overtopping and catastrophic failure of the dam during a high-water event. Significant flooding can occur during spillway flow. Please pay attention to your local authorities.
Route 183 floods between Mt. Pleasant and Bernville.
The beach at the Dry Brooks Day Use Center is subject to closure.
Boat launch ramps around the lake are subject to closure.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States
dataAttribution.title: US Geological Survey

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are not available. Only observed stages are available for this point.
